metadata.description: AI-PDLC agent plugins for Claude Code and Cowork

plugins.name: incident-triage
plugins.description: Triage production incidents with severity classification, historical context, and post-triage actions. Includes on-call agent persona, SQLite MCP server, and bundled incident database.

plugins.name: incident-triage-internal
plugins.description: Internal marketplace copy of incident-triage plugin. Triage production incidents with severity classification, historical context, and post-triage actions.
